series_metadata.series_title: COMMISSION MEETING MINUTES, AGENDAS, AND PACKETS\

retention_rules.disposition_method: PERMANENT RECORD.

series_metadata.series_title: RECORDINGS OF MEETINGS

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary Record. Retain until the official minutes are adopted and signed.

series_metadata.series_title: INTERNAL COMMITTEE MEETING MINUTES/NOTES

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary Record. Retain 5 years.

Temporary Record. Retain for useful life.

series_metadata.series_title: ATTENDANCE/USAGE RECORDS - ATTENDANCE LOGS AND SIGN-IN SHEETS

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary Record. Retain 6 years or until any resulting litigation is concluded (Code of Alabama 1975 § 6-2-34).

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary Record. Retain for useful life.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary Record. Retain 1 year after audit.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary Record. Retain until completion of final narrative report. If no report is required, retain for useful life.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary Record. Retain 1 year after audit.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary Record. Retain correspondence 3 years; retain shipping receipts and other routine financial records 1 year after audit.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary record. Retain 30 days, or until final disposition/resolution of any criminal cases, litigation, or other incidents for which recordings provide evidence.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Temporary Record. series_metadata.series_title: WEBSITE AND SOCIAL MEDIA SITE(S)

retention_rules.disposition_method: PERMANENT RECORD. *(ADAH staff captures and preserves the agency's website and other social media sites via a service offered by the Internet Archive \[Archive It\]. Check with ADAH website at www.archive-it.org/ organizations/62 to ensure your agency website and social media site(s) are captured and preserved. If your agency's website and social media site(s) are not captured by the service, please contact the Government Services Division at 334-242-4452 to get them included.)*
